  GpuSortExec: expr=[s_suppkey@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=8388608
      GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(total_revenue@4, max(revenue0.total_revenue)@0)], projection=[0, 1, 2, 3, 4]

          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([total_revenue@4], 8), input_partitions=8

                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=8388608

                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=8388608

          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([max(revenue0.total_revenue)@0], 8), input_partitions=1
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[max(revenue0.total_revenue)]
              GpuCoalescePartitionsExec

                  GpuProjectExec: expr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)@1 as total_revenue]

--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=3752
